fields.title: extension:  autocomplete in editor (wrap existing provider)
fields.description:
Add $skill autocomplete while typing in pi interactive editor.

Approach:
- ctx.ui.setEditorComponent() install CustomEditor subclass that wraps the existing autocomplete provider injected by interactive-mode.
- Implement AutocompleteProvider wrapper:
  - If cursor is at token matching (start|whitespace) + "$" + partialName => return skill suggestions (fuzzy match).
  - applyCompletion inserts "$" + skillName only (no expansion).
  - Otherwise delegate to underlying provider so / commands and @file completion keep working.

Code anchors (pi-mono reference):
- Autocomplete provider: packages/coding-agent/src/modes/interactive/interactive-mode.ts (CombinedAutocompleteProvider)
- Editor supports custom autocomplete providers: packages/tui/src/components/editor.ts + packages/tui/src/autocomplete.ts

DoD:
- Typing "$be" + Tab suggests beads (if available) and inserts "$beads".
- Existing / and @ completion still works unchanged.
- No noticeable lag while typing.
fields.close_reason: Implemented $skill autocomplete by wrapping existing editor autocomplete provider
